text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day—a modest event where you
give chocolate to the person most important to
you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean c'mon! Spare me the "made with love"
crap—it's made with cacao! Beans!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Her less-than-subtle rant echoes around the
area.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's not handmade, but I did at least buy some White Lightning chocolates at the dollar store. I mean, they are good.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But how are ya supposed to share your feelings with chocolate anyways? I am grateful for all they do, just...
choice_data_list: ...Aren't you going to give them to me?
...Aren't you going to give them to me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ack, you heard all that?! Aw geez...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh, y'know what? I dunno what I feel, but that's your problem now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Here's a token of my feelings. All yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I accept her chocolates. And then...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: W-what's with that look?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I g-guess this is what Valentine's is like, huh.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This feelin'... It's kinda hard to figure out... My
chest feels all warm and bubbly, like a hot pot...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Are ya happy 'bout the chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gotcha. Well, that's good...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I was expectin' Valentine's Day to
be more... awkward, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I didn't realize it was gonna be this nice... Guh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross struggles to wrap her head around
the Valentine's Day concept.
choice_data_list: I'll return the favor on White Day.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh, return da favor?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My heart's already poundin' here... And then
imagine gettin' a present on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nah, nah, nah. You don't have to do that, honest!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A-anyways, enjoy the chocolate! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross darts away, disappearing in the
blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Wh-why'd I shoot off like that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day is no joke! If this keeps happenin'
every year...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
People are gonna start callin' me the Bright Red
Lightning! Now I don't even wanna look at
chocolate...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nope. Nope nope nope! I'm vetoing that! I can't
keep this feelin' all for myself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Happiness is somethin' ya gotta share.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross nods to herself...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. If ya really wanna do somethin' for
White Day...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Could ya pay it forward to the squirts back home
instead?
choice_data_list: You mean your brother and sister?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Tell 'em about everythin' I've done for ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They'd be over the moon to hear from ya. It'll be
like you're their new big brother.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They'd be over the moon to hear from ya. It'll be
like you're their new big sister.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm holding ya to it, then. A bit of
happiness for everyone...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm sure my siblin's'll warm up to ya real quick.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we make our mini promise, I feel the trust
between us growing even deeper.
